name: Quick Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and core the cabbage, cutting it into small wedges.
2 Place the cabbage in a food processor.
3 Process until finely minced.
4 Add the chopped onions and sugar, pulsing to mix.
5 Add just enough mayonnaise to moisten the mixture.
6 Cover and chill for 4-24 hours.
7 Serve slightly chilled.
